description: Determines the properties of the creature's summoning ability.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the properties of the creature's summoning ability.

entries.description: The creature can summon other creatures that are greatly inferior to it.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can summon other creatures that are greatly inferior to it.

entries.description: The creature can summon other creatures that are about the same power level as it is.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can summon other creatures that are about the same power level as it is.

entries.description: The creature can summon other creatures that are greater than it is.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can summon other creatures that are greater than it is.

entries.description: The creature can summon only one creature.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can summon only one creature.

entries.description: The creature can summon multiple creatures at once.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can summon multiple creatures at once.

entries.description: The creature can only use this power a limited number of times (a certain number of times per day, for instance).

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can only use this power a limited number of times (a certain number of times per day, for instance).

entries.description: The creature has full control over the creatures it summons.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature has full control over the creatures it summons.

entries.description: The creature has no control over the creatures it summons.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature has no control over the creatures it summons.

entries.description: Once summoned, the creatures remain in effect for a limited duration.

descriptionTranslations.en: Once summoned, the creatures remain in effect for a limited duration.

entries.description: Once summoned, the creatures will remain for as long as needed.

descriptionTranslations.en: Once summoned, the creatures will remain for as long as needed.

entries.description: If the creature has other abilities, it can use some or all of its abilities through the summoned creatures (for instance, if the creature has a resistance of some kind, then the summoned creatures share that resistance).

descriptionTranslations.en: If the creature has other abilities, it can use some or all of its abilities through the summoned creatures (for instance, if the creature has a resistance of some kind, then the summoned creatures share that resistance).

entries.description: The creature can sense what the summoned creatures sense (i.e., it can see through their eyes, etc.).

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can sense what the summoned creatures sense (i.e., it can see through their eyes, etc.).

entries.description: The creature is in telepathic communication with its summoned creatures.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature is in telepathic communication with its summoned creatures.

entries.description: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate or a contradictory result, treat it as another dose of this power (for instance, if you get the creature can only summon one creature twice, then treat it as though the creature has this power twice, summoning a different monster with each summons).

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate or a contradictory result, treat it as another dose of this power (for instance, if you get the creature can only summon one creature twice, then treat it as though the creature has this power twice, summoning a different monster with each summons).
